titles.title: A Broken Prayer Is Still a Prayer

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: When you can't pray 'cause you can't say the things you feel inside Your thoughts are scattered like the shattered pieces of your life You don't have to wait any longer Just bring all your troubles to the father

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: A broken prayer is still a prayer We know the Lord will be right there when we cry A fragile praise is still a praise It will be heard when it is raised to the sky We don't need words of eloquence when we talk to him 'Cause the savior is concerned with every care He hears a broken prayer

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: There is a place that's always a refuge from the rain Where you'll be covered with his love and his unfailing grace He longs to shelter you with arms of mercy Though you think your prayer is so unworthy

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: The petition may not seem like much for us to offer up But bring up to him anyway He loves it when we trust
